attributes.action: Gov't 2 advise Bank of England not 2 take Churchill's face off of our £5 note.
attributes.additional_details: This act by the Bank erodes a little more from our national pride and history.
attributes.background: To instruct the Bank of England to re-think this idea.

rejection.details:
Bank notes are the responsibility of the Bank of England, which is independent of the Government and Parliament.

You can find out how the Bank decides who will be on bank notes here:
https://www.bankofengland.co.uk/banknotes/banknote-characters
